geographic_restrictions: Rhode Island, with priority given to students in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket
project_area: educational opportunities, project-based learning, student-led seminars, and enrichment activities
demographic_requirements: students in Pre-K through grade 12, with priority for those in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket
eligibility_summary: Open to all public school students in Rhode Island in Pre-K through grade 12. Priority given to students in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket. The program is free and aims to address learning losses during COVID-19.
